title: EIB Dimmer
description: Using the +/- input trigger sets an appropriate value at the output for EIB dimmer

inputs.description: Off: Status = OFF, Dimmer Value = 0%. Permanent ON will not block the control
Connect this input to a EIB-sensor (group address switching or response of switching)
Connect this input to a EIB-sensor (group address brightness or response of brightness)

outputs.description: Output D is the analog dimmer output and represents a relative "Dim by ±value%" command, where each + or − sends an additional dimming step. Connect this output to a EIB-dimmer actuator (group address dimming)
Switching output for turning On and Off dimmer This output is controlled by the inputs (On) and (Off). Connect this output to a EIB-dimming actuator (group address switching)
Connect this output to a EIB-dimming actuator (group address brightness).
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands
